title: ‘Such a Bust’: Dems Walked Right into Trump Trap at SOTU
author: Breitbart TV
fullText:
Wednesday on “The Alex Marlow Show,” host and Breitbart Editor-in-Chief Alex Marlow talked about the State of the Union.
Marlow said, “Remember, these people think that illegal aliens are the best Americans. And that is such a bust by Trump.”
The Alex Marlow Show, hosted by Breitbart Editor-in-Chief Alex Marlow, broadcasts coast to coast on weekdays from noon to 1 p.m. Eastern on the Salem Radio Network stations. You can listen to the radio show online here. The show also airs at 9 p.m. Eastern on the Salem TV news channel. Marlow’s podcast, The Alex Marlow Show Presented by Breitbart News, is released weekdays at 9 p.m. Eastern. You can subscribe to the podcast on YouTube, Rumble, Apple Podcasts, and Spotify.
Follow Breitbart.tv on X @BreitbartVideo
